scripts.test:unit: NODE_OPTIONS=--openssl-legacy-provider dojo build --mode unit && dojo test --unit --config local
scripts.test:functional: NODE_OPTIONS=--openssl-legacy-provider dojo build --mode functional && dojo test --functional --config local
scripts.test:all: NODE_OPTIONS=--openssl-legacy-provider dojo build --mode unit && NODE_OPTIONS=--openssl-legacy-provider dojo build --mode functional && dojo test --all --config local
